ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen */,
  "specimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the specimen */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used in the specimen */,
  "PREN_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the PREN level of the specimen */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the specimen (mm) */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometry of the specimen (e.g., cylindrical, rectangular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES material_types ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_PREN_id FOREIGN KEY ("PREN_id") REFERENCES PREN_levels ("PREN_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "welding_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of welding parameters */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen these parameters apply to */,
  "heat_input" REAL /* Heat input during welding (kJ/mm) */,
  "welding_process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the welding process used */,
  "welding_speed" REAL /* Speed of welding */,
  "shielding_gas" TEXT /* Shielding gas used (e.g., Argon, Helium) */,
  "shielding_gas_flow_rate" REAL /* Shielding gas flow rate (L/min) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_welding_parameters_welding_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("welding_process_id") REFERENCES welding_processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_welding_parameters_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the welding parameters related to this measurement */,
  "cap_dimension" REAL /* Measurement of the cap dimension (mm) */,
  "root_dimension" REAL /* Measurement of the root dimension (mm) */,
  "HAZ_cap_dimension" REAL /* Measurement of the HAZ dimension for the cap (mm) */,
  "HAZ_root_dimension" REAL /* Measurement of the HAZ dimension for the root (mm) */,
  "yield_strength" REAL /* Yield strength of the specimen (MPa) */,
  "ultimate_strength" REAL /* Ultimate strength of the specimen (MPa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES welding_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "properties" TEXT /* Properties of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material (g/cm^3) */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity of the material (W/mK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "PREN_levels" (
  "PREN_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PREN level */,
  "PREN_level" TEXT /* Level of Pitting Resistance Equivalent Number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PREN level */,
  "min_PREN_value" REAL /* Minimum PREN value for this level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("PREN_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "welding_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each welding process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the welding process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the welding process */,
  "energy_input" REAL /* Energy input of the welding process (kJ/mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "data_changed" TEXT /* Data changed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen this image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen this prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_property" TEXT /* Property predicted by the system (e.g., yield strength) */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., linear regression, neural network) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
